result_name: Integrating traditional agricultural practices with modern technology for enhanced productivity
title: Integrating traditional agricultural practices with modern technology for enhanced productivity
result_description:
The content of the Planting Date Advisories was developed into messages and disseminated to farmers across Bihar through the dissemination platforms of BAU, JEEViKA and IFFCO.
These advisories support farmers in making more informed planting decisions based on seasonal and climate conditions.

core_innovation.title: Innovation development - Progress report of Aflasafe activities in Sierra Leone, highlighting key implementation milestones and ongoing efforts to expand its adoption among farmers.

scaling_ambition_statement: By 2030, the Sustainable Farming will work together with Ministry of Agriculture, Irrigation and Water Development (Malawi), National Smallholder Farmers' Association of Malawi and World Food Programme to accomplish the use of Progress report of Aflasafe activities in Sierra Leone, co funded by the World Bank Food Security Resilience Program for Sierra Leone by 800000 women (320000 youth / 480000 non-youth) & 1200000 men (480000 youth / 720000 non-youth) Farmers/(agro)pastoralist/ herders/ fishers.
